sqlMap.select:
select distinct o.id as memberId,o.org_department_id departId from org_member o where ($sql$)
and o.is_enable = 1 and o.is_deleted = 0 and is_admin = 0 and is_internal != '0' and type != '2'

select distinct o.id as memberId,o.org_department_id departId from org_member o where ($sql$)
and o.is_enable = 1 and o.is_deleted = 0 and is_admin = 0 and is_internal != '0' and type != '2' and o.id in (select f.source_id from org_relationship f where f.objective0_id in (select id from org_unit where type = 'Department' and is_enable = 1) and f.type = 'Member_Role' and f.objective1_id in (select id from org_role r where r.code='DepManager') )
sqlMap.delete: delete imy_complicTipSon s where s.formmainId = #formmainId# and signdep is null
delete imy_complicTipSon_cap4 s where s.formmainId = #formmainId# and signdep is null
sqlMap.select: select id, state, start_member_id, start_date, approve_member_id, approve_date, finishedflag, ratifyflag, ratify_member_id, ratify_date, sort, modify_member_id, modify_date, traincode, senduserno, senddate, jointranmembe, jointrandepar, jointrancompa, removetranmembe, trainsubject, traincontent, note, attacheid, senddepart from imy_compcptrain i where i.id= #id#

select id, state, start_member_id, start_date, approve_member_id, approve_date, finishedflag, ratifyflag, ratify_member_id, ratify_date, sort, modify_member_id, modify_date, traincode, senduserno, senddate, jointranmembe, jointrandepar, jointrancompa, removetranmembe, trainsubject, traincontent, note, attacheid, senddepart from imy_compcptrain_cap4 i where i.id= #id#

select id, state, start_member_id, start_date, approve_member_id, approve_date, finishedflag, ratifyflag, ratify_member_id, ratify_date, sort, modify_member_id, modify_date, traincode, senduserno, senddate, jointranmembe, jointrandepar, jointrancompa, removetranmembe, trainsubject, traincontent, note, attacheid, senddepart from imy_compcptrain_flow i where i.id= #id#

select id, state, start_member_id, start_date, approve_member_id, approve_date, finishedflag, ratifyflag, ratify_member_id, ratify_date, sort, modify_member_id, modify_date, traincode, senduserno, senddate, jointranmembe, jointrandepar, jointrancompa, removetranmembe, trainsubject, traincontent, note, attacheid, senddepart from imy_compcptrain_flow_cap4 i where i.id= #id#

select id, finishedflag, traincode, senduserno, senddate, jointranmembe, jointrandepar, trainsubject, traincontent, note, attacheid, senddepart, isfinishstudy, contactdepart, attachmark from wf_compcptrain w where w.traincode = #code#;

select id, finishedflag, traincode, senduserno, senddate, jointranmembe, jointrandepar, trainsubject, traincontent, note, attacheid, senddepart, isfinishstudy, contactdepart, attachmark from wf_compcptrain_cap4 w where w.traincode = #code#;
sqlMap.delete: delete imy_compcptrainson_cap4 s where s.formmain_id = #formmainId# and jointrandepar is null
sqlMap.select: select w.notemember from wf_complictip w where w.compliancecode = #code# and w.finishedflag = 1
select w.notemember from wf_complictip_cap4 w where w.compliancecode = #code# and w.finishedflag = 1
select w.jointranmembe from wf_compcptrain w where w.traincode = #code# and w.finishedflag = 1
select w.jointranmembe from wf_compcptrain_cap4 w where w.traincode = #code# and w.finishedflag = 1
select id from imy_complictip where compliancecode = #flowCode#
select id from imy_compcptrain where trainCode = #flowCode#
select id,joinTrandepar,jointranmembe,jointranedmembe from imy_compcptrainson_flow where formmain_id = #id# and joinTrandepar is not null
select id,signdep,signedmember,signmember from imy_complictipson_flow where formmain_id = #id# and signdep is not null
sqlMap.insert:
insert into imy_compcptrain( id, STATE ,START_MEMBER_ID ,START_DATE , APPROVE_MEMBER_ID ,APPROVE_DATE,FINISHEDFLAG ,RATIFYFLAG ,RATIFY_MEMBER_ID ,RATIFY_DATE , SORT ,MODIFY_MEMBER_ID ,MODIFY_DATE , traincode, senduserno, senddate, jointranmembe, jointrandepar, jointrancompa, removetranmembe, trainsubject, traincontent, note, attacheid, senddepart ) select #newId#, STATE ,START_MEMBER_ID ,START_DATE , APPROVE_MEMBER_ID ,APPROVE_DATE,FINISHEDFLAG ,RATIFYFLAG ,RATIFY_MEMBER_ID ,RATIFY_DATE , SORT ,MODIFY_MEMBER_ID ,MODIFY_DATE , traincode, senduserno, senddate, jointranmembe, jointrandepar, jointrancompa, removetranmembe, trainsubject, traincontent, note, attacheid, senddepart
from imy_compcptrain_flow where id = #id#

insert into imy_complictip( id, STATE ,START_MEMBER_ID ,START_DATE , APPROVE_MEMBER_ID ,APPROVE_DATE,FINISHEDFLAG ,RATIFYFLAG ,RATIFY_MEMBER_ID ,RATIFY_DATE , SORT ,MODIFY_MEMBER_ID ,MODIFY_DATE , compliancecode, senduserno, notetitle, notecontent, attacheid, compliancetype, senddepartment, notemember, notedepart, notecompa, noteremovemember ) select #newId#, STATE ,START_MEMBER_ID ,START_DATE , APPROVE_MEMBER_ID ,APPROVE_DATE,FINISHEDFLAG ,RATIFYFLAG ,RATIFY_MEMBER_ID ,RATIFY_DATE , SORT ,MODIFY_MEMBER_ID ,MODIFY_DATE , compliancecode, senduserno, notetitle, notecontent, attacheid, compliancetype, senddepartment, notemember, notedepart, notecompa, noteremovemember from imy_complictip_flow where id = #id#
sqlMap.select: select fieldchinessname as "fieldChineseName",fieldName as "fieldName" from VM_FLOWCONFIGURATION where templateNo = #code#
